effective_supply.source: GS Exhibit 9 (sow-based supply yoy; effective sow herd period-end)
GS Exhibit 11 (PSY-adjusted output +3% yoy - cycle peak)

street_estimates.key_view: ~50% of listcos <6m cash runway by end-2Q26; 5% supply deficit 2H26; below replacement cost
Sow cuts accelerate through 2Q26; 37.5mn reachable by 3Q26; cold storage partially absorbs; 2027 yoy improvement
MOA 17-Jun meeting: hard end-Sep deadline for 37.5mn sow target; provincial reduction targets released in June

street_estimates.inflection_call: Q2 = cycle low - trend reversal confirmed; no 2027 surge
street_estimates.key_view: Standardized-capacity cut only ~3pp (efficiency offset); 37.5mn likely by Sep, approached in Jul; Env Protection Law effective Aug; risk: destocking pauses if price > cost line in Aug; SMEs wait-and-see not exited - latent capacity caps 2027

distress_events.event: Restructuring signed; litigation count rising through 2026
Risk warning on accumulated negative retained capital
Alert on delisting risk and debt default

price_checkpoints.source: CN media 9-Jul: 11th straight up-day +20% off Apr low; loss per Changjiang; piglet 7kg YTD low (Mysteel); Mysteel Jun sow -0.98pct MoM; Shandong/Guangdong pre-Sep sow deadlines

CN media 13-Jul: piglet REBOUNDED +47 in 10d back above 200 trigger (restocking sentiment); 2nd-fattening barn util 27->44.5pct in 3wk (Aug marketing risk); frozen pork inv 27.2pct +10pp since Feb; avg weight 128kg 4-yr high; Jun sow -0.91 (Yongyi) / -0.98 (Ganglian) MoM
